name: Good first issue
about: Propose a small, safe starter task for new contributors
title: "Good first issue: "
labels: good first issue

## Goal

What should a new contributor improve?

## Why this is safe for a first contribution

Explain why this task is small, bounded and low-risk.

## Suggested files

```text

```

## Scope

- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Design / brand asset
- [ ] Tests / validation
- [ ] Safe runtime stub
- [ ] Research note
- [ ] Social/community content

## Privacy and safety notes

- [ ] Uses synthetic data only
- [ ] No secrets or credentials
- [ ] No real private user data
- [ ] No external services
- [ ] No model weights
- [ ] No production-readiness claims

## Validation target

```bash
python scripts/validate_repo_structure.py
```

Add additional validation if needed:

```bash
cd ios && swift test
cd ios && swift build
```

## Stop rules

Stop if the task requires private data, secrets, real app permissions, external AI delegation, model weights, signing files or broad architecture rewrites.

## Reference

See `docs/community/GOOD_FIRST_ISSUES.md` for starter task ideas.
